name: §dBingo
description:
§8All Skills

§7Strength: §c25
§7Health: §c100
§7Speed: §f75

§6Lucky Looting
§7§7Gain §c25% §7more collection
§7items from any source!

§6Mountain Climber
§7§7Gain §c50% §7more HOTM Experience.

§6Fast Learner
§7§7Gain §c250% §7more Skill Experience and
§7Slayer Experience

§6Chimera
§7§7Increases the base stats of
§7your active pet by §c15%§7.

§6Scavenger
§7Gain §c40§7 more coins per
§7monster level on kill.

§6Consumer
§7§7Potion effects you obtain will
§7have §c1% §7more time.

§6Power Of Completion
§7Gain §c+2❁ Strength§7, §9+1☣
§9Crit Chance§7, and §c+5❤
§cHealth§7 per completed Personal
§7Bingo Goal in the current Bingo
§7Event

§7§8This pet's perks are active
§8even when the pet is not
§8summoned!
